# Template Review Guide

We've built one template page for each page type on the site. Before we create the remaining ~100 pages, we need your sign-off on these templates - both the content and the design.

Once these templates are approved, we'll use them as the blueprint to build out every other page in the site architecture.

---

## What to Review

There are **8 template pages** - one per page type. Each one represents the pattern that every page of that type will follow.

| Page Type | URL to Review | What This Template Covers |
|---|---|---|
| Feature | `/products/cue/` | All 5 feature pages |
| Persona | `/for/solo-agents/` | All 4 persona pages |
| Integration | `/integrations/follow-up-boss/` | All 3 integration pages |
| Comparison | `/compare/sayso-vs-shilo/` | All 3 comparison pages |
| Objection | `/objections/not-ready-yet/` | All 15 objection pages |
| Glossary | `/glossary/circle-prospecting/` | All 10 glossary pages |
| Blog (pillar) | `/blog/real-estate-cold-calling-guide/` | All pillar blog posts |
| Blog (supporting) | `/blog/expired-listing-scripts/` | All supporting blog posts |

---

## How to Review

For each of the 8 pages above, please do two passes:

### 1. Content Review

Read through the page and check:

- **Accuracy** - Does this match how Sayso actually works? Are there any claims that are wrong or overstated?
- **Tone** - Does this sound like how we talk to customers? Too formal, too casual, too salesy?
- **Completeness** - Is anything important missing? Anything that should be cut?

For content changes, just note what needs to change and why. Inline comments, a list of bullet points, or marked-up text all work.

### 2. UI / UX Review

Click through the page on both desktop and mobile. Look at:

- **Layout** - Does the page structure make sense? Is anything in the wrong order?
- **Spacing & alignment** - Anything feel too cramped or too spread out?
- **CTAs** - Are the buttons clear and in the right spots?
- **Mobile** - Does everything look right on a phone?

**For UI feedback, please provide annotated screenshots** - take a screenshot of the area that needs changes, then mark it up with arrows/circles/text explaining what should change and how. This has worked well in the past and makes it much easier to act on the feedback precisely.

---

## Understanding the Full Scope

To see every page that still needs to be built, refer to the **Site Architecture & Keyword Map**:

📄 `docs/architecture/site-architecture.md`

This document lists every page on the site organized by section (features, personas, integrations, comparisons, objections, glossary, blog). Each entry shows the URL, the target keyword, and the SEO difficulty rating.

The template pages listed above are the first page in each section. Everything else in the site architecture follows the same template - different content, same structure and design.

### Quick numbers

- **~105–115 total pages** planned across all sections
- **8 template pages** built (what you're reviewing now)
- **~97–107 remaining pages** to create after templates are approved

---

## What Happens After Your Review

1. You review the 8 template pages (content + UI/UX)
2. We incorporate your feedback and get final approval on each template
3. We produce the remaining pages section by section, using the approved templates as blueprints

No remaining pages get built until the templates are locked in - your feedback here shapes everything that follows.
